channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Trump hits back at critics as Iran peace deal fuels debate over U.S. concessions
item.description: The deal sees both sides commit to further talks to reach a final agreement over the next 60 days and includes a $300 billion plan for Iran's reconstruction.

item.title: Here are 5 wild stats from SpaceX's first week on the Nasdaq
item.description: SpaceX's first few days of trading have been filled with superlatives, from trading volume to the size of the company's first acquisition.

item.title: Gas prices fall below $4 per gallon as oil supply fears ease after Iran deal
item.description: Gas prices are still 30% higher compared to what drivers paid before the U.S. and Israel attacked Iran on Feb. 28.

item.title: Here are the odds of SpaceX becoming the world's most valuable company
item.description: SpaceX debuted as the fifth-biggest stock. The path to third place could take years, at least according to options prices.

item.title: Here are Thursday's biggest analyst calls: SpaceX, Apple, Marvell, CME, Palantir, Nike, Amazon, Micron & more
item.description: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Thursday.

item.title: Godfather of AI blasts Musk's xAI as 'failure,' says labs are risking a 'big bubble explosion'
item.description: Yann LeCun's comments renew a long-running spat with Musk and cast doubt over valuations of some of the world's biggest AI companies.

item.title: Hollister partners with Target to tap into $89 billion back-to-college shopping market
item.description: Hollister's partnership with Target comes as both companies look to capitalize on the lucrative back-to-college shopping market.

item.title: Intel surges 9% after Trump says company will partner with Apple on U.S. chip design
item.description: The boost continues Intel's recent rally as the chipmaker bounces back from years of headwinds.

item.title: Stock futures rise as Wall Street tries to rebound from Fed-led sell-off; Intel leads chips higher: Live updates
item.description: After hitting a fresh intraday all-time high, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ultimately closed more than 500 points lower on Wednesday.

item.title: Women have better retirement savings habits but lower 401(k) balances than men, Vanguard finds
item.description: While women tend to save more of their paycheck for retirement, they have lower 401(k) balances due to other factors, including wages that trail men's earnings.

item.title: Analysis: Chairman Kevin Warsh’s task forces are the key to understanding the new Fed
item.description: The new leader of the Fed left interest rates alone but made clear how he plans to rewire the central bank.

item.title: Here are the five big takeaways from Kevin Warsh's first meeting as Fed chairman
item.description: The Federal Reserve and Chairman Kevin Warsh on Wednesday followed the script on interest rates closely.

item.title: Obama Center launch brings Democratic political glitterati to Chicago ahead of crucial elections
item.description: Political elites, White House alums, donors and business leaders will converge on Chicago on Thursday to commemorate the launch of the Obama Presidential Center.

item.title: Nearly 80% of data center capacity is at elevated risk to climate hazards like flooding and fire, study says
item.description: The vast majority of data centers globally face either acute risk from climate change events or chronic risk from ongoing climate issues like extreme heat.

item.title: Roy Cooper's North Carolina Senate race could help decide control of the next Congress
item.description: North Carolina’s 2026 Senate race pits Democrat Roy Cooper against Republican Michael Whatley in a swing state Democrats haven't won since with Obama in 2008.

item.title: Hegseth warns NATO allies that some nations will 'fail' U.S. defense review
item.description: The U.S. defense secretary also said it was "shameful" that European allies refused to give U.S. forces access to bases to strike Iran.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Intel, SpaceX, Micron, Carnival & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.

item.title: Pfizer CFO Dave Denton to step down, leave company in August
item.description: Pfizer said on Thursday that finance ⁠chief Dave Denton will step down ​and leave ​the U.S. drugmaker ​on August 15.

item.title: Jeffrey Gundlach says Fed's Warsh is not going to be the 'easy money' chairman many hoped for
item.description: Gundlach said Warsh's stance reduces the risk of overly accommodative monetary policy that could reignite inflation and push longer-term borrowing costs higher.

item.title: KBW says buy the dip on CME Group shares, says perpetual futures fears are overblown
item.description: The investment firm upgraded the exchange name to outperform from market perform.

item.title: SpaceX adds longtime Elon Musk ally Roelof Botha to board
item.description: Roelof Botha, who worked with Elon Musk at PayPal in the dot-com era before becoming a prominent venture capitalist, is joining the SpaceX board.

item.title: Can you get a loan for a wedding? The do's, don'ts and alternatives
item.description: You can take out a personal loan to finance your wedding, but follow these guidelines first.

item.title: JetBlue to reduce Newark, LaGuardia footprint as it forges ahead in Fort Lauderdale
item.description: JetBlue is planning to cut some employee bases at Newark Liberty International Airport in New Jersey and tech bases at New York's LaGuardia Airport.

item.title: Jim Cramer says this chipmaker is still a buy after soaring more than 200% this year
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer named Intel as his top stock pick, arguing that investors should focus on the company's future AI opportunities.

item.title: Swiss central bank readies for FX intervention if safe haven franc strengthens
item.description: The SNB left interest rates unchanged, as it highlighted the risk of renewed upward pressure on the Swiss franc amid ongoing uncertainty.

item.title: Bank of England holds interest rates at 3.75% amid Iran war peace prospects
item.description: The Bank of England's Monetary Policy Committee voted 7-2 to keep rates on hold.

item.title: Defense contractors would be barred from buying back their stock in bill approved by Senate panel
item.description: A bill the Senate Armed Services Committee approved would prevent defense contractors from buying back their stock without Pentagon approval.

item.title: CME CEO Terrence Duffy says the exchange operator will sue CFTC over perpetual futures
item.description: Outgoing CME CEO Terrence Duffy said that the exchange operator will sue the CFTC over the agency’s decision to approve perpetual futures.

item.title: Allbirds continues AI pivot with name change and CEO hire, sending stock soaring
item.description: Allbirds became NewBird AI in April and said it would trade shoes for AI compute infrastructure.

item.title: CEOs of Anthropic and Google DeepMind call for U.S.-led AI coalition in meeting at G7
item.description: Tech leaders and heads of state, including President Donald Trump, joined a meeting about AI standards at the G7 Summit.
